name: vibe-new-app
description: Full spec-driven setup workflow for building a brand new app from scratch with an AI coding agent. Triggers on "new:" prefix, "I want to build a new app", "starting a new project", "help me spec out a new app", "new project". Always use when the user is starting a greenfield project — even without the exact prefix. Generates CLAUDE.md at project root and the complete vibe/ folder. Reads BRIEF.md and ARCHITECTURE.md if they exist — skips questions already answered. Step 5 generates a complete multi-phase feature map in PLAN.md — every feature sequenced, dependencies explicit, parallel opportunities identified, future phases sketched. TASKS.md Phase 2+ shows ordered features with dependencies visible — not slugs. Generates a minimal ARCHITECTURE.md from PLAN.md if architect: was skipped. TASKS.md is the single human-facing file. TODO.md does not exist. Requires: frontend-design skill for Step 3 wireframe generation.
